playbook.nb_question_pattern: When NB finds AU-001, they typically ask for missing or insufficient documentation in: Quality Audit Documentation
recommended_remediation_steps: Step 1: Identify the specific gap in Quality Audit Documentation
Step 2: Gather primary evidence (test reports, literature, certificates)
Step 3: Update the CER section with explicit evidence references
Step 4: Cross-reference with IFU/RMF for consistency
Step 5: Pre-review against the authoring defense checklist
evidence_needed: Review the CER section for AU-001 compliance
Ensure evidence is provided for all claims related to AU-001
Cross-reference with NB expectations for AU-001
playbook.typical_timeline: 2-4 weeks for evidence gathering + document update

playbook.nb_question_pattern: When NB finds BR-001, they typically ask for missing or insufficient documentation in: §5 Benefit-Risk Analysis, Risk Management
recommended_remediation_steps: Step 1: Identify the specific gap in §5 Benefit-Risk Analysis
Step 2: Gather primary evidence (test reports, literature, certificates)
Step 3: Update the CER section with explicit evidence references
Step 4: Cross-reference with IFU/RMF for consistency
Step 5: Pre-review against the authoring defense checklist
evidence_needed: Benefits must be quantified where possible (endpoint values, patient numbers)
Risks must be mapped to RMF hazard IDs
Residual risk acceptability must be justified per indication
playbook.typical_timeline: 2-4 weeks for evidence gathering + document update

Step 3: Update the CER section with explicit evidence references

evidence_needed: Review the CER section for CL-001 compliance
Ensure evidence is provided for all claims related to CL-001
Cross-reference with NB expectations for CL-001
playbook.typical_timeline: 2-4 weeks for evidence gathering + document update

playbook.nb_question_pattern: When NB finds DO-001, they typically ask for missing or insufficient documentation in: §2 Device Description, §2.1 Basic Information, §2.2 Intended Purpose
recommended_remediation_steps: Step 1: Identify the specific gap in §2 Device Description
Step 2: Gather primary evidence (test reports, literature, certificates)
Step 3: Update the CER section with explicit evidence references
Step 4: Cross-reference with IFU/RMF for consistency
Step 5: Pre-review against the authoring defense checklist
evidence_needed: Verify device name is IDENTICAL across all sections — no abbreviations or variants
List EVERY model/variant with design rationale and clinical scenario
Intended purpose must specify: patient population, clinical setting, intended users
playbook.typical_timeline: 2-4 weeks for evidence gathering + document update

recommended_remediation_steps: Step 1: Identify the specific gap in All Sections (cross-reference)
Step 2: Gather primary evidence (test reports, literature, certificates)

playbook.nb_question_pattern: When NB finds EQ-001, they typically ask for missing or insufficient documentation in: §4.2 Equivalence Demonstration
recommended_remediation_steps: Step 1: Identify the specific gap in §4.2 Equivalence Demonstration
Step 2: Gather primary evidence (test reports, literature, certificates)
Step 3: Update the CER section with explicit evidence references
Step 4: Cross-reference with IFU/RMF for consistency
Step 5: Pre-review against the authoring defense checklist
evidence_needed: Identify at least 2-3 potential equivalent devices
Complete three-pillar comparison: technical, biological, clinical — ALL must be present
Every difference must have explicit Impact Assessment
playbook.typical_timeline: 2-4 weeks for evidence gathering + document update

playbook.nb_question_pattern: When NB finds EV-001, they typically ask for missing or insufficient documentation in: §3 SOTA, §4 Clinical Evidence, §4.4 Literature Review
recommended_remediation_steps: Step 1: Identify the specific gap in §3 SOTA
Step 2: Gather primary evidence (test reports, literature, certificates)
Step 3: Update the CER section with explicit evidence references
Step 4: Cross-reference with IFU/RMF for consistency
Step 5: Pre-review against the authoring defense checklist
evidence_needed: Document PICO-based search strategy in structured table
Search at least 2 databases (PubMed + Embase minimum)
Include PRISMA flow diagram
playbook.typical_timeline: 2-4 weeks for evidence gathering + document update

playbook.nb_question_pattern: When NB finds GS-001, they typically ask for missing or insufficient documentation in: §6 GSPR Compliance
recommended_remediation_steps: Step 1: Identify the specific gap in §6 GSPR Compliance
Step 2: Gather primary evidence (test reports, literature, certificates)
Step 3: Update the CER section with explicit evidence references
Step 4: Cross-reference with IFU/RMF for consistency
Step 5: Pre-review against the authoring defense checklist
evidence_needed: Every 'N/A' GSPR needs 2+ sentence technical justification tied to device design
Justification must reference SPECIFIC device characteristic
Risk management file cross-reference for non-applicable items
playbook.typical_timeline: 2-4 weeks for evidence gathering + document update

playbook.nb_question_pattern: When NB finds LB-001, they typically ask for missing or insufficient documentation in: IFU, Labeling, SSCP
recommended_remediation_steps: Step 1: Identify the specific gap in IFU
Step 2: Gather primary evidence (test reports, literature, certificates)
Step 3: Update the CER section with explicit evidence references
Step 4: Cross-reference with IFU/RMF for consistency
Step 5: Pre-review against the authoring defense checklist
evidence_needed: IFU must include: intended purpose, contraindications, warnings, precautions
Symbols per ISO 15223-1
Language requirements per MDR Art 10(11)
playbook.typical_timeline: 2-4 weeks for evidence gathering + document update

PMCF-CER feedback loop must be described
